source: On the way I turn off the lights before the kitchen gets busy.
By the window I turn off the lights without rushing.
Just before eight I fold the towels so I do not forget.
In the library I refill my bottle while my tea steeps.
Right after lunch I refill the kettle while the room is quiet.
On the bus I charge my phone with no stress.
After the meeting I set an alarm without rushing.
Near the park I close the curtains before it gets late.
Before lunch I cook some pasta and keep things simple.
